Article.ArticleTitle: The pen is mightier than the machine-artificial intelligence image generators in urology.

Reference.Citation: Enjellina, Beyan EVP, Rossy AGC. A review of AI image generator: influences, challenges, and future prospects for architectural field. J Art Int Arch. 2023; 2: 53-65
